calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llc And Kevin Welshs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Mar-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC and KEVIN WELSH'S Hearing on Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

Petitioners' unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon" is granted.

Order and Judgment signed.

JJudge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
